title: F1 Performance Analytics
description: SQL driven insights into Formula 1 performance metrics, including lap times, pit stop efficiency, and driver comparisons.

title: IMDB Movie Explorer
description: A beginner-friendly SQL project exploring the IMDb dataset using SQL queries. Built using DataGrip + the IMDb Complete Dataset (Kaggle).

title: Python ATM Machine
description: A simple ATM simulation built with Python, demonstrating core OOP principles and user interaction.

title: Graphical Calculator
description: Dual-mode scientific calculator! Whether you're a terminal purist or prefer clickable buttons, we've got you covered with both a command-line and graphical interface.
